parameters.query: Resources | where subscriptionId in~ ('99999999-9999-9999-9999-999999999999') | extend owner = tostring(tags['owner']), environment = tostring(tags['environment']), cost_center = tostring(tags['cost-center']) | summarize total=count(), no_owner=countif(owner == ''), no_environment=countif(environment == ''), no_cost_center=countif(cost_center == '') by subscriptionId
